name: Light-Style Fiesta Shrimp Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen cooked shrimp, thawed, rinsed and drained
1 package Light cream cheese, softened (8 oz)
1/3 cup Thinly sliced green onions (with tops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop shrimp, reserving a few whole shrimp for garnish.
2. Combine cream cheese and mayonnaise; mix well.
3. Reserve 1 tablespoon green onions for garnish.
4. Stir remaining green onions and remaining ingredients into cream cheese mixture; mix well.
5. Spoon into serving bowl.
6. Chill at least 2 hours or up to 24 hours.
7. Stir before serving.
8. Garnish with reserved shrimp and green onions.
9. Serve with assorted vegetable dippers.
Makes about 2 cups.
